name: Azure Data Explorer MCP Server
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Azure Data Explorer/Eventhouse in Microsoft Fabric. Provides access to Azure Data Explorer/Eventhouse clusters and databases through standardized MCP interfaces, allowing AI assistants to execute KQL queries and explore data.

tools.name: execute_kql_query
tools.description: Execute KQL queries against Azure Data Explorer.

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List tables in the configured database.

resources.name: tables
resources.description: Tables in the configured Azure Data Explorer database.

resources.name: schemas
resources.description: Schemas of tables in the database.

env.name: ADX_CLUSTER_URL
env.description: URL of the Azure Data Explorer cluster

env.name: ADX_DATABASE
env.description: Name of the Azure Data Explorer database
